_comment: EXAMPLE — copy to .claude/settings.json (and review!) to enable agent auto-switching. The hook commands are read-only routers: they only inject context, they do not modify files or run other tools. Permissions block is INTENTIONALLY MINIMAL — review and widen yourself, never copy permissions blindly.

hooks.description: Match the prompt + recent git diff against .claude/routing/agent-router.md and inject a <system-reminder> listing activated agents.
Match the target file path against path triggers in .claude/routing/agent-router.md and inject a reminder if a specialist agent owns that path.
